creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
drm-XXX-kmod will never depend on the meta-port gpu-firmware-kmod.
If you know what version of drm you want/need you need to install this version and the right firmware package, if you don't know you need to install drm-kmod meta port which as said above will install the currently best supported version based on the FreeBSD version and also install all the firmware.
